headline: Wells Fargo Raises its Price Target on KLA Corporation (KLAC)
summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is one of the 10 All-Time High Stocks with Legs to Rally Further. On June 22, 2026, Wells Fargo raised its price target on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) to $305 from $210 previously and maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. Wells Fargo expects continued positive semi-cap results in Q2. On June 17, […]

headline: Navitas Semiconductor shares are trading higher. The company announced the launch of two new packages, top-side cooled QDPAK and a low-profile TO-247-4L, to its 5th-gen GeneSiC technology platform.
